steps.title: Target the contrast
steps.content: The goal is to contrast how green backgrounds are used in the two countries. The notes say US directional signs use green on highways, major roads, and minor roads, while UK directional signs use green on major roads.

steps.title: Show the different scope
steps.content: The strongest sentence contrasts the broader US use of green with the narrower UK use. A shifts to blue signs, C states a similarity, and D omits green backgrounds altogether. The answer is B.
